headline: C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) Stock Looks Rich As It Absorbs $75m Logistics Deal
summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide stock has delivered a strong 128.5% return over the past 5 years, yet its current valuation checks lean expensive, setting up a clear tension between past share price gains and what the fundamentals are signalling today. Over the last 5 years, investors in C.H. Robinson Worldwide have seen a 128.5% total return, which puts extra focus on whether the current price still leaves much room for further value creation.
